ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., G, F, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches format */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft round */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "shooting_hand" TEXT /* Player's dominant shooting hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Player's agent's name or ID */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (NULL if still active) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Information about the player's contract (e.g., contract length, salary) */,
  "position_on_team" TEXT /* The specific position the player plays on the team (e.g., starting point guard, backup center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games in the season */,
  "playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams that qualify for the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the round belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games in the round */,
  "champion" TEXT /* The team that won the round (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_round_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-round statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the round */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the round */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the round */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the round */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player in the round */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in the round */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in the round */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player in the round */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player in the round */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots made by the player in the round */,
  "three_point_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots attempted by the player in the round */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player in the round */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the player in the round */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the round */,
  "field_goal_percentage" TEXT /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" TEXT /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" TEXT /* Free throw percentage */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_round_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_round_stats_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "number_of_picks" INTEGER /* Total number of picks in the draft */,
  "draft_location" TEXT /* Location where the draft was held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pick (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected in the pick */,
  "pick_value" TEXT /* Value of the pick (e.g., lottery pick, first-round pick) */,
  "pick_trade_details" TEXT /* Information about any trades involving the pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, scout, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity being accessed (e.g., player, team) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title or honor */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title or honor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the title or honor was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the title or honor */,
  "awarding_body" TEXT /* The organization that awarded the title (e.g., NBA, All-Star Game committee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_titles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team title or honor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the team title or honor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the title or honor was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team title or honor */,
  "awarding_body" TEXT /* The organization that awarded the title (e.g., NBA, All-Star Game committee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_titles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to recover */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Additional medical notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
